Class LayerTreeNode

java.lang.Object
org.tailormap.api.viewer.model.LayerTreeNode
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
@Generated(value="org.openapitools.codegen.languages.SpringCodegen", comments="Generator version: 7.22.0") public class LayerTreeNode extends Object implements Serializable
Grouping of layers in a tree structure.
